name: Parking Ticket Response Pack
description: Prepare a deadline card, response checklist, evidence list, and short appeal draft for a parking ticket before the deadline passes.
author: OpenClaw Batch AC
target_user: Drivers or vehicle owners who received a parking ticket and need to decide whether to pay, contest, or gather evidence before a deadline.
use_cases: Building a deadline card from user-provided citation data
Choosing a pay or contest path for administrative planning
Gathering photos, receipts, permits, and timeline evidence
Drafting a short factual appeal for user review
